description: Execute V0.8-M1: Implement the .agent-state/ path resolution logic in the MCP Server and scaffold the initial YAML DAG parser capable of reading the new Archon-lite schema.
scope: 1. Modify src/mcp-server/src/index.ts to dynamically resolve paths using process.env.PROJECT_ROOT/.agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json, falling back to workflow/dispatch.json. 2. Implement src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts (or similar) to parse a YAML workflow file and translate its nodes into execution-contract.json outputs. 3. Update documentation and bin/agent-protocol-init to scaffold .agent-state/workflows/.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the dynamic LLM router (M2). NO SubAgent review automation daemon logic (M4). NO removal of legacy tooling. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of standard M1 progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M1 contract.
